items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) received analyst upgrades in the past week, highlighting confidence in its lithium-focused business model. Research firms cited expansion and productivity improvements. Stock at $133.7 after -16.6% pullback over past week, -24.7% over past month, but +108.6%

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Albemarle CCO Eric Norris: grid energy storage demand growing steadily, more evenly distributed globally vs EV irregularity.

items.headline: Albemarle upgraded to Buy by Citi
items.snippet: Citi upgraded ALB to Buy (from Neutral), PT $225 unchanged. Market underestimating growth potential. ESS production ~950 GWh this year (+35% YoY), expanding to ~1300 GWh by 2027.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC reiterated outperform, boosted PT to $257. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027, market likely balanced to under-supplied through 2050.
